CustomField.label: Survey - Why don't you need SW?

value.fullName: I only needed this account for one project
value.label: I only needed this account for one project

value.fullName: I found a different solution that answers my needs
value.label: I found a different solution that answers my needs

value.fullName: I feel this platform didn't meet my business needs
value.label: I feel this platform didn't meet my business needs

value.fullName: I finished my project that required this data, and I would use SimilarWeb again in the future
value.label: I finished my project that required this data, and I would use SimilarWeb again in the future

value.fullName: I finished my project that required this data, and I would NOT use SimilarWeb again in the future
value.label: I finished my project that required this data, and I would NOT use SimilarWeb again in the future

value.fullName: I didn't use my account often enough to make it worthwhile
value.label: I didn't use my account often enough to make it worthwhile

value.fullName: I am leaving my company or role
value.label: I am leaving my company or role
